message:
feat(core, router): CSRF middleware and typed path parameters

CSRF Protection Middleware (middleware.rs):
- Add CsrfToken struct with generate(), as_str(), and Display impl
- Implement thread-safe token generation using timestamp+counter+thread-id
- Add CsrfMode enum: DoubleSubmitCookie, SynchronizerToken, SignedDoubleSubmit
- Implement CsrfProtection middleware with configurable:
  - Cookie name and path
  - Header name for token validation
  - Exempt paths and methods (GET/HEAD/OPTIONS by default)
  - Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite cookie attributes
  - Token validation with constant-time comparison
- Support both cookie-based and header-based token sources

Router Typed Parameters (trie.rs, match.rs):
- Add ParamValue enum: Str, Int, Float, Uuid, Path variants
- Implement type-safe parameter extraction with as_str(), as_int(), as_float()
- Add into_string() for consuming string-based variants
- Extend path matching to parse and validate typed parameters at route time
- Support converter-based validation ({id:int}, {score:float}, {uuid:uuid})

These additions enable secure form handling and type-safe URL parameter
extraction, bringing the framework closer to production readiness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
